element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Icon-based menu system, NPC interaction, equipment management
Turn-based combat system similar to Dragon Quest/Wizardry
3D first-person perspective exploration, spatial orientation in maze structure
Predetermined fights, increased difficulty vs random encounters
Three characters in need of rescue; story changes based on completion
Essential for defeating Dark Sol, guides dungeon progression logic

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating exploration-to-combat cycles within dungeon segments; safe town breaks between major dungeon pushes; tension escalates through deeper dungeon progression and boss encounters

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Three optional character rescues scattered throughout dungeon; story branching based on rescue completion creates player agency in exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to turn-based combat and icon menu system in safe town; first dungeon teaches basic encounter patterns with manageable random enemies
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Dungeon complexity increases; boss encounters introduce predetermined fight difficulty; optional rescue objectives require additional exploration and combat
difficulty_curve.late_game: Quest for Arms of Light drives deeper dungeon penetration; stronger boss encounters; story conclusion branches based on rescue completion
notable_spikes: First boss encounter—shift from random to predetermined combat
Late-game boss fights guarding Arms of Light components

notable_level_patterns.description: 3D first-person maze exploration with turn-based combat. Each dungeon level features random encounters interspersed with predetermined boss fights. Spatial progression is gated by narrative objectives (Arms of Light acquisition, character rescues)

Safe town hub serves as strategic rest point and narrative anchor. Players plan equipment, save via priests, and gather information before dungeon re-entry. Creates pacing rhythm of tension-relief cycles
Three rescuable characters create secondary exploration goals within dungeon maze. Story outcome changes based on which characters are recovered, encouraging replays and exploration depth
